rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring To Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2024 line 1. RESPONDENTS' MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO BRING TO TRIAL is OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal on file. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: REAL MANAGEMENT CO. VS. EDUARDO S MORALES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2024 line 15. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT is DENIED without prejudice. Defendant has not appeared in this action and no first appearance fee has been paid for the defendant. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that CCP 664.6 is applicable under the circumstances of this case. The Court further notes that there is no proof of service for the summons and complaint on file. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
